question: Which segment appears to have the largest share in the last year shown?

options.A: The brown segment shows the largest share.
options.B: The green segment shows the largest share.
options.C: Cannot determine which segment has the largest share without a legend to explain what each color represents.
options.D: The purple segment shows the largest share.

explanation: The chart displays different colored segments but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category has the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
